parameters.query: SELECT value_json FROM project_memory WHERE key = 'project_picture' LIMIT 1

INSERT INTO project_memory (key, value_json)
VALUES ('project_picture', $1::jsonb)
ON CONFLICT (key) DO UPDATE
  SET value_json = EXCLUDED.value_json,
      updated_at = now()

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { success: false, reason: $json.reason || 'Unknown error' } }];
